action:Olive___olive_peacock_spot: Apply copper-based fungicide. Remove and destroy affected leaves.
action:Olive___aculus_olearius: Apply acaricide treatment during spring flush.
action:Olive___Diseased: Inspect closely. Prune affected branches and improve air circulation.
action:Tomato___Late_blight: Apply fungicide immediately. Remove infected plants to prevent spread.
action:Tomato___Early_blight: Apply copper or mancozeb fungicide. Mulch to reduce soil splash.
action:Tomato___Bacterial_spot: Use copper sprays. Avoid overhead irrigation. Rotate crops.
action:Tomato___Septoria_leaf_spot: Remove lower infected leaves. Apply chlorothalonil fungicide.
action:Tomato___Leaf_Mold: Improve ventilation. Reduce humidity. Apply fungicide if severe.
action:Tomato___Target_Spot: Apply fungicide. Ensure proper plant spacing.
action:Tomato___Spider_mites Two-spotted: Spray with insecticidal soap or neem oil. Increase humidity.
action:Tomato___Tomato_Yellow_Leaf_Curl_: Remove infected plants. Control whitefly vectors.
action:Tomato___Tomato_mosaic_virus: Remove infected plants. Disinfect tools. Use resistant varieties.
action:Orange___Haunglongbing_(Citrus_gr: Remove infected trees. Control psyllid vector. No cure available.
action:Pepper,_bell___Bacterial_spot: Use copper sprays. Rotate crops. Use disease-free seeds.
